task: Create an ICP (Ideal Customer Profile) for a B2B SaaS selling compliance automation to mid-market companies.
expect: Includes firmographic filters (industry, revenue range, employee count, geography)
Identifies behavioral signals indicating buying intent
Maps specific pain points to the compliance automation solution
Defines disqualification criteria to filter out poor-fit prospects

task: Build a sales playbook for a $15K ACV deal with a typical 45-day sales cycle.
expect: Defines discrete sales stages with entry/exit criteria
Includes discovery questions tied to qualifying frameworks
Provides a demo script outline with key value propositions
Covers objection handling with specific rebuttals
Details closing tactics appropriate for the deal size and cycle length

task: A prospect went silent after receiving our proposal 2 weeks ago. They were highly engaged before. Create a re-engagement plan.
expect: Designs a multi-channel follow-up sequence (email, phone, LinkedIn)
Includes value-add touchpoints rather than just check-in messages
Contains a breakup email as final touchpoint
Specifies a timeline with cadence between each touchpoint
